backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all game types (UserProfile, Monster, BattleLog, etc.) and mixing in blob storage and authorization modules for a ninja/monster battle game backend.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no features listed, used for build/CI feature tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Ash's Pokemon Journey' that mounts the React app at the #root div via the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, React Query client, and dark-mode ThemeProvider.
Reusable animated sprite component supporting emoji or image sprites with configurable size, animation state, element badge overlay, and ninja sparkle particles.
Overlay animation component that displays an elemental emoji projectile with impact rings during a battle attack, supporting player or opponent direction.
frontend/src/components/BadgeDisplay.tsx: Dojo seal grid component that renders earned vs. unearned elemental seals with color highlights and grayscale for unearned ones.
frontend/src/components/ElectricityEffec: SVG lightning bolt animation component that renders randomized electric bolts and aura rings, with reduced bolt count and slower interval on mobile for performance.
frontend/src/components/EvolutionModal.t: Modal component that handles Pokémon evolution using an evolution stone, showing before/after stats and animating the evolution sequence via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Displays a styled health bar for a monster with dynamic color changes based on HP percentage and an optional element type badge.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing responsive desktop header and mobile header with dropdown and bottom navigation for the Ninja Quest game routes.
frontend/src/components/NinjaBattleSprit: Renders a static battle sprite for a ninja monster with glow aura, element badge, and CSS transform-based attack/dodge animations.
frontend/src/components/PokemonBattleSpr: Renders a draggable battle sprite for the player's monster with mouse and touch drag support, plus attack/dodge transform animations.
frontend/src/components/ShadowClanEncoun: Full-screen encounter modal that introduces the Shadow Clan villains with animated dialogue lines and Battle/Flee action buttons.
frontend/src/components/StrategyInput.ts: Text input form for entering a ninja battle strategy that highlights detected ninja keywords as tags below the input field.
frontend/src/components/TeamRocketEncoun: Renders a Team Rocket encounter modal that sequentially displays the classic Team Rocket motto lines, then offers the player Battle or Flee buttons, with a blast-off animation on fleeing.
frontend/src/data/monsterData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data for all game monsters, including their elemental types, stats, moves, evolution forms, and associated lookup maps for colors, clan names, and crystals.
frontend/src/data/pokemonData.ts: Provides local Pokémon data (stats, moves, sprites) used by the battle system, including Pikachu as the strongest entry and a set of starter Pokémon with their move definitions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions (user profile, monsters, badges, battle log, dojo challenges, XP), with several mutations handled client-side via sessionStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines dark-theme CSS custom properties using oklch colors, and declares custom keyframe animations for battle/electricity effects along with utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Battle.tsx: Battle page component managing a turn-based monster battle flow with phases (select, battle, result), attack animations, battle log, and XP awarding via backend queries.
frontend/src/pages/GameHome.tsx: Home dashboard page displaying the player's profile summary and a grid of navigation cards linking to Battle, Story, Dojos, Roster, Lore, and Profile pages.
frontend/src/pages/GameLore.tsx: Game lore page presenting four narrative chapters (Ancient World, Six Clans, Shadow Clan, Player Role) with a tab-style chapter selector and a banner image.
frontend/src/pages/GymBattles.tsx: Dojo selection page listing six elemental dojos with difficulty ratings, allowing the player to select and challenge a dojo leader which stores dojo info in sessionStorage and navigates to the Battle page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login landing page with animated background particles and an Internet Identity login button, redirecting authenticated users to the game route.
frontend/src/pages/PokemonRoster.tsx: Displays the player's ninja monster roster grid along with a crystal inventory panel, pulling monster data from static definitions and user profile queries.
frontend/src/pages/ProfessorOakIntro.tsx: Implements a typewriter-style intro dialogue sequence with Sensei Ryoku, then collects the player's ninja name and clan before saving their profile and navigating to starter selection.
frontend/src/pages/StarterSelection.tsx: Presents a grid of all elemental starter monsters for the player to choose from, storing the selection in sessionStorage and navigating to the game on confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/StoryCampaign.tsx: Shows a three-arc story campaign with 30 episodes total, allowing the user to switch between arcs and view episode listings with element tags.
frontend/src/pages/TrainerProfile.tsx: Displays the authenticated player's profile card, victory/dojo-seal stats, earned achievements, and a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for an elemental ninja-themed game, defining custom colors (fire, water, earth, wind, lightning, shadow), fonts, glowing box shadows, gradients, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for an original monster-battling RPG called 'Elites Monsters Battling' with an elemental ninja theme, tracking version, architectural notes, required image assets, and existing features.
